The '''''Falx''''' was a [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] that was owned and operated by [[Dimok (people)|Dimoks]] during the [[Sepan Civil War]]. ''Falx'' aided other Dimok [[Starship/Legends|starships]] in raiding a [[Ripoblus (people)|Ripoblus]] [[Modular conveyor|Modular Conveyors]] carrying munitions supply convoy in the beginning of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sepan campaign]].

Launching from [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]'s flagship, the [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory-I'' class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] identified the marauding corvette's crew as Dimoks, yet also located stolen Imperial supplies aboard the Ripoblus cargo vessels. The civil war was more complex than suspected. With the intent to drive off the Dimok raiders, Imperial fighters destroyed the cargo ferry ''[[Mangonel]]'' along with numerous [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] (groups [[Baker Squadron|Baker]], [[Adam Squadron|Adam]] and [[Charlie Squadron|Charlie]]), while the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] fired [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] at the corvette, destroying it.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
